column1: What are the five combined categories used to organize the 2026 AI tools landscape?
column2: Chat, Notes & Voice, Image & Video, Automation & Code, and Agentic Frontier.

column1: How is the 'Highest' AI/Agentic Level defined in the landscape?
column2: A true agent that plans multi-step work, executes it, and recovers from errors.

column1: What is the industry-wide open standard that allows AI agents to plug into tools and files?
column2: Model Context Protocol (MCP).

column1: In the 'Captain's Call' tiering system, what does the 'S' classification represent?
column2: Essential tools that every captain should run daily.

column1: In the 'Captain's Call' tiering system, what does the 'A' classification represent?
column2: Recommended tools to add once the Essential set is established.

column1: In the 'Captain's Call' tiering system, what does the 'B' classification represent?
column2: Deeper tools for when a user is going further in their AI journey.

column1: In the 'Captain's Call' tiering system, what does the 'C' classification represent?
column2: Specialty tools built for specific tasks that should be picked only if needed.

column1: What is the primary differentiator for Anthropic's Claude compared to other general-purpose assistants?
column2: Cowork mode, which runs agentic workflows on the desktop or mobile.

column1: Which OpenAI tool is specifically designed to handle computer-use tasks?
column2: ChatGPT Agent (formerly known as Operator).

column1: Under what circumstance does Gemini become 'essential' for a captain?
column2: When their ministry or business work is natively hosted in Google Workspace.

column1: What is the primary use case for xAI's Grok tool?
column2: Accessing real-time X data and an unfiltered conversational style.

column1: Which search-first AI tool is characterized by its built-in citations and agentic browser?
column2: Perplexity.

column1: What is the primary advantage of DeepSeek for 'cost-sensitive captains'?
column2: It provides frontier-class reasoning models at zero cost in its web app.

column1: What transcription model is used under the hood by most industry-leading audio tools?
column2: OpenAI Whisper.

column1: On which operating systems does Apple Voice Memos provide on-device transcription via Apple Intelligence?
column2: iOS 18+ and macOS 18+ on recent devices.

column1: Which image generation tool is recommended for the best aesthetic quality for stylized images?
column2: Midjourney.

column1: For which user group is the Stable Diffusion/FLUX.1 stack most recommended?
column2: Technical captains who want full control, local privacy, and no per-image costs.

column1: What pairing allows for AI-powered search across local Markdown files in Obsidian?
column2: Smart Connections or the Copilot plugin.

column1: What distinguishes the Granola tool from a raw recorder like Otter.ai?
column2: It generates clean, structured meeting notes by listening to audio context rather than just transcribing.

column1: Which free Google tool allows users to Q&A across uploaded document sets and generate natural audio summaries?
column2: NotebookLM.

column1: Why is Claude considered the default primary tool for the bootcamp?
column2: Because its native agentic Cowork mode allows it to act as an adjutant on the user's machine.

column1: Which tool acts as the 'granddaddy of automation' with over 7,000 app integrations?
column2: Zapier.

column1: What is the primary reason a technical captain would choose n8n over Zapier?
column2: To achieve data sovereignty and full control through self-hosting.

column1: What is the core function of the Claude Code terminal agent?
column2: It autonomously reads repos, writes code, runs tests, and opens PRs under supervision.

column1: What distinguishes Cursor from standard coding environments?
column2: It is an AI-first fork of VS Code with baked-in autocomplete and multi-file editing agents.

column1: Which open-source pair programmer is 'model-agnostic,' allowing users to bring their own API key?
column2: Aider.

column1: When is the HeyGen AI avatar tool considered worth the investment for a captain?
column2: Only when producing high-volume course or sales content at a scale that cannot be physically filmed.

column1: What is the primary function of Lovable.dev?
column2: Generating full-stack web apps (React + Tailwind) from natural-language prompts.

column1: Which autonomous web agent is noted for its ability to research topics and synthesize documents independently?
column2: Manus.

column1: What is Perplexity Comet?
column2: An AI-powered agentic browser included with Perplexity Pro.

column1: Which open-source tool allows a user to run Python code on local files via natural language commands?
column2: Open Interpreter.

column1: If a captain needs to draft a sermon or blog post, why is Claude the recommended choice?
column2: It offers the best long-context reasoning and links study files via Cowork.

column1: What tool combination is recommended for creating print-quality flyer artwork?
column2: Ideogram for text-in-image and Magnific for upscaling to print quality.

column1: Which free tool is recommended for 'cleaning up' a low-quality phone-mic recording?
column2: Adobe Podcast Enhance.

column1: What tool is the 'Winner' for auto-clipping long videos into short-form content for social media?
column2: OpusClip.

column1: Which tool should be used for buying back time on email if the workflow lives in a desktop app?
column2: Claude Cowork (local).

column1: What is the 'Captain's Redline' regarding pastoral or counseling notes?
column2: Never paste confidential conversations into cloud LLMs; use encrypted notes or paper.

column1: Why are children's health records considered a redline for cloud LLMs?
column2: Sensitive medical data like diagnoses and medication regimens belong in secure portals, not LLMs.

column1: What financial information is explicitly forbidden from being pasted into AI tools?
column2: Account numbers, routing numbers, and balances tied to specific identifiers.

column1: What is the rule regarding 'Marriage Confidences' in AI usage?
column2: Never paste specific quotes, intimate context, or anything shared without a spouse's consent.

column1: Which security credentials should never be entered into AI, even if the tool promises privacy?
column2: SSNs, passport numbers, API keys, and passwords.

column1: How should a captain handle 'Other People's Private Info' when seeking advice from an AI?
column2: Abstract the situation rather than including names and specific identifiable details.

column1: What is the general 'rule of thumb' for determining if information belongs in a cloud LLM?
column2: If losing the data through a breach or training pipeline would be a serious problem, do not upload it.

column1: What alternative is recommended for processing redline data that cannot go to the cloud?
column2: Moving the task to a local model on a 'Sovereign Stack.'

column1: Which tools comprise the 'Minimum Viable' stack for a captain starting with AI?
column2: Claude (free), Apple Voice Memos, Perplexity (free), NotebookLM, and Suno (free).

column1: What is the approximate monthly cost of the 'Solo Founder' stack?
column2: $\$40$ to $\$60$ per month.

column1: Which specific tool is added to the 'Solo Founder' stack to handle hands-off tasks and image generation?
column2: ChatGPT Plus.

column1: For whom is the 'Power User' stack ($150-200/mo) specifically designed?
column2: Captains who are already shipping 5 or more hours of content per week.

column1: In the 'Power User' stack, which tool is recommended for high-end voice generation?
column2: ElevenLabs.

column1: Which tool in the 'Power User' stack is specifically for podcast and video editing?
column2: Descript.

column1: What is the recommended tool for shipping a working web app over a single weekend without coding knowledge?
column2: Lovable.dev or Bolt.new.

column1: Term: Redundancy check
column2: Definition: An assessment of whether a new tool overlaps too heavily with one already in the captain's stack.

column1: Why is ChatGPT Plus ($20/mo) recommended as a secondary tool alongside Claude Pro?
column2: It provides a 'sanity-check' second opinion and superior image generation capabilities.

column1: What is the 'Captain's Call' for Grok?
column2: Skip it as a primary tool unless you are a heavy X user or want a contrarian second take.

column1: Which tool is the recommended 'Winner' for custom intro music for media projects?
column2: Suno.

column1: At what frequency does the 'AI Tools Landscape' refresh its pricing and product snapshots?
column2: Every 6 months.
